response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development with a focus on various technologies including AI-related ones. They have experience in leading and contributing to multiple projects, showcasing their technical innovation and leadership skills.
strengths: Proven experience in full-stack development and AI-agent infrastructure
Strong background in multiple programming languages and technologies
Entrepreneurial spirit with experience in founding and developing projects
concerns: Lack of direct experience in cloud technologies
No explicit mention of AI expertise or products built with AI
Not directly mentioned experience in advising customers on cutting-edge technologies
